details.name: FC Mitte e.V.

images.prompt: Cartoon-style swimming pool poster: 'Schwimmbad Aqua Fun'. Shows pool, water slide, sauna icon, Mo-Fr 6-22, adults 5€, children 3€. Fuxie cartoon, blue water colors, legible font.
Cartoon-style football club poster: 'FC Mitte - Fußball'. Shows football, goal, jersey, training Wed+Sun, membership 15€/month, summer tournaments. Fuxie cartoon, green field colors, legible font.
